name: Cold Turkey Reuben Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Turkey breast thinly sliced (and of course cooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread 1 tablespoon of yogurt on each rye bread slice.
2. Divide the sliced turkey evenly among the top halves of the bread slices.
3. Spoon 1/3 cup of Sweet and Sour Red Cabbage over each sandwich, then cover with the remaining bread slices.
Food Exchange per serving: 2 STARCH EXCHANGES + 2 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGES
CHO: 31g; FRO: 22g; FAT: 5g; CAL: 254;
For low-sodium diets, omit salt from Sweet and Sour Red Cabbage.
SWEET AND SOUR RED CABBAGE:
1. Place cabbage, vinegar, water, margarine, and salt in a deep cooking pot.
2. Cover and cook for about 15 minutes or until crisp-tender, stirring occasionally with a large kitchen spoon.
3. Remove from heat and gradually add sugar while stirring well with the spoon.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 5g; PRO: 1g; FAT: 3g; CAL: 42;
For low-sodium diets, omit salt. Use unsalted margarine.
